mapper.sql: id, inspection_id, repairman_id, area_id, pipe_id, task_name, type, priority, status, public_time, response_time, accomplish_time, feedback_information, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.task_name as title, t.type, CONCAT(a.province, a.city, a.district) as area_name, p.name as pipe_name, t.priority, t.status, r.name as assignee, r.phone, t.public_time, t.response_time, t.accomplish_time, t.feedback_information FROM task t LEFT JOIN repairman r ON t.repairman_id = r.id LEFT JOIN area a ON t.area_id = a.id LEFT JOIN pipe p ON t.pipe_id = p.id WHERE t.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task (inspection_id, repairman_id, area_id, pipe_id, task_name, type, priority, status, public_time, response_time, accomplish_time, feedback_information, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{inspectionId}, #{repairmanId}, #{areaId}, #{pipeId}, #{taskName}, #{type}, #{priority}, #{status}, #{publicTime}, #{responseTime}, #{accomplishTime}, #{feedbackInformation}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task WHERE status = 1
AND area_id = #{areaId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task WHERE status = 1 AND create_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task WHERE DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task WHERE status = 2
AND area_id = #{areaId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task WHERE status = 0
AND area_id = #{areaId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM task WHERE priority = 1
AND area_id = #{areaId}
